'''ngakaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycotoxicity|mycotoxicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycotoxicity|mycotoxicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngakaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækæyæth|ngækæyæth]] || [[word:ngækæyæj|ngækæyæj]] || [[word:ngækæyæsh|ngækæyæsh]] || [[word:ngækæyæ|ngækæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakakayath|ngakakayath]] || [[word:ngakakayaj|ngakakayaj]] || [[word:ngakakayash|ngakakayash]] || [[word:ngakakaya|ngakakaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakayath|ngakayath]] || [[word:ngakayaj|ngakayaj]] || [[word:ngakayash|ngakayash]] || [[word:ngakaya|ngakaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakafyath|ngakafyath]] || [[word:ngakafyaj|ngakafyaj]] || [[word:ngakafyash|ngakafyash]] || [[word:ngakafyaf|ngakafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakayatha|ngakayatha]] || [[word:ngakayaja|ngakayaja]] || [[word:ngakayasha|ngakayasha]] || [[word:ngakayaka|ngakayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakayath|ngakayath]] || [[word:ngakayaj|ngakayaj]] || [[word:ngakayash|ngakayash]] || [[word:ngakaya|ngakaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakayathal|ngakayathal]] || [[word:ngakayajal|ngakayajal]] || [[word:ngakayashal|ngakayashal]] || [[word:ngakayakal|ngakayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakayathatha|ngakayathatha]] || [[word:ngakayajaja|ngakayajaja]] || [[word:ngakayashasha|ngakayashasha]] || [[word:ngakayaka|ngakayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakayathan|ngakayathan]] || [[word:ngakayajan|ngakayajan]] || [[word:ngakayashan|ngakayashan]] || [[word:ngakayakan|ngakayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakayathaoro|ngakayathaoro]] || [[word:ngakayajaoro|ngakayajaoro]] || [[word:ngakayashaoro|ngakayashaoro]] || [[word:ngakayakaoro|ngakayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
